title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should shift from pure coding competency to understanding fundamental principles like security, reliability, and cost while leveraging AI agents for code generation. The video emphasizes that reviewing AI-generated infrastructure code against core engineering fundamentals and knowing why systems are built a certain way is increasingly critical in the AI era.
